description: As Food Safety Director Elena Marchetti for Harborview Culinary Group, LLC, create a comprehensive HACCP (Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points) plan for their 6,800 sq ft central production kitchen in Baltimore, MD. Using the facility and food safety data provided in /home/ga/Documents/facility_haccp_data.json, produce a professionally formatted document in Apache OpenOffice Writer that meets regulatory standards. The plan must include at least 7 major sections using Heading 1 paragraph style (such as Facility Description, HACCP Team, Process Flow, Hazard Analysis, Critical Control Points, Monitoring Procedures, Verification, and Record-Keeping), at least 8 subsections using Heading 2 style, and at least 3 formatted tables (e.g., HACCP team roster, hazard analysis table, and CCP summary table). The document must also feature an auto-generated Table of Contents at the beginning, page numbers in the footer, and incorporate the 5 CCP definitions, critical limits, and monitoring procedures from the source data. The final document should be substantial (at least 30 paragraphs) and saved to /home/ga/Documents/Harborview_HACCP_Plan_2024.odt.
